narrative_beat: Daniel profeta hebraico segurando pergaminho antigo, olhos arregalados de espanto ao ver câmeras de vigilância modernas surgindo do fundo escuro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, divine golden light on face, crimson shadows, 35mm grain, floating embers, biblical oppressive atmosphere

shot.depth_of_field: sharp face and scroll, blurred surveillance cameras background

subject.primary: photorealistic ancient Hebrew prophet Daniel, dark beard, robes, expression of profound shock and awe — eyes wide open staring into camera — holding an unrolled parchment scroll, occupying left 50% of frame
subject.focal_point: Daniel's eyes — wide, luminous, filled with shock and revelation
subject.secondary: glowing golden light falling from above-left on his face, deep shadows on right side
props: golden divine light beam from upper left

environment.location: ancient Babylonian chamber background transitioning into dark modern space filled with blurred CCTV surveillance cameras, multiple screens showing faces — blurred black-and-white right side
environment.time_of_day: timeless — divine light source above, darkness below

composition.rule: rule of thirds — prophet anchored left half
composition.foreground: Daniel's face illuminated by golden light, warm golden and amber tones, left 50% of frame
composition.midground: scroll in hands catching the divine light
composition.background: right 35% of frame: dark space with blurred modern surveillance cameras in black-and-white — intentionally dark for text overlay
composition.safe_zone_for_overlay: right third (35%) of frame — kept dark and empty for title text

lighting.key_light: divine golden beam from upper left, creating strong facial illumination on left side
lighting.fill_light: warm crimson ambient from candles below
lighting.rim_light: gold rim on beard edge and scroll

style.post_processing: golden divine highlight on face, deep crimson shadows, desaturated black-and-white background cameras, dark vignette edges, halation on divine light
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, floating embers, parchment texture

mood.emotion: divine shock, prophetic revelation, impossible knowledge

symbolism.primary: ancient prophet holding the scroll that describes the modern surveillance state
symbolism.secondary: 2500-year gap between prophecy and fulfillment visualized in background

negative_as_positive: photorealistic, not illustration, not cartoon, not Renaissance painting style
prophet face real and expressive — genuine shock — not serene or neutral
prophet occupies left 50% — right third must remain dark and empty for text
background cameras MUST be desaturated black-and-white
face MUST be warm golden and amber tones
no text or logos in image

in_scene_text.note: Text DANIEL PREVIU / 1984 / 2.500 ANOS ANTES will be added in post-production on right third

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
